caption: A presentation slide titled "DARPA Open Programmable Secure 5G (OPS-5G)" is displayed, with a small video inset of a man in a dark shirt speaking in the upper right corner. The slide outlines an objective to "Pursue research leading to development of a portable standards-compliant network stack for 5g mobile that is open source and secure by design." It compares "Proprietary: Easier, Faster" with "Open Systems: Portable, slower." On the right, a diagram shows a layered architecture with "Portable Common Open Source SW elements for OPS-5G" at the top, followed by a "Hardware Abstraction Layer." The bottom layer is split into "Untrusted HW," "Trusted HW," and "Open Source HW." A yellow highlight box moves across the slide, first focusing on the "Untrusted HW" block and then shifting slightly to the right. Logos for "#opennetledge," "THE LINUX FOUNDATION," "LF NETWORKING," and "LF EDGE" appear at the bottom.
